mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (title, content, type, status, attempts, borrow_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{attempts}, #{borrowId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET status = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
